label: Difficulty
description: Defines a difficulty preset that controls threat scaling, yield factors, hazard rates, and tactical restrictions for a RimWorld playthrough.

isCustom.label: Is custom
isCustom.description: Marks this def as the special Custom slot where the player sets all sliders manually. When true the numeric fields on this def are not used.

threatScale.label: Threat scale
threatScale.description: Primary multiplier applied to raid point budgets and most AI encounter budgets.

allowBigThreats.label: Allow big threats
allowBigThreats.description: Whether large-scale raid events such as mechanoid clusters and major faction assaults are permitted.

allowIntroThreats.label: Allow intro threats
allowIntroThreats.description: Whether the scripted introductory threat sequence fires at the start of a new game.

allowCaveHives.label: Allow cave hives
allowCaveHives.description: Whether insect hive infestations can spawn in underground cave areas.

peacefulTemples.label: Peaceful temples
peacefulTemples.description: When true, ancient danger rooms do not spawn hostile enemies when opened.

allowViolentQuests.label: Allow violent quests
allowViolentQuests.description: Whether quests that require the player to engage in combat are offered.

predatorsHuntHumanlikes.label: Predators hunt humanlikes
predatorsHuntHumanlikes.description: Whether wild predator animals can target and hunt human-like pawns.

babiesAreHealthy.label: Babies are healthy
babiesAreHealthy.description: When true, babies are always born without health conditions or deficiencies.

noBabiesOrChildren.label: No babies or children
noBabiesOrChildren.description: When true, reproduction and child development mechanics are disabled entirely.

scariaRotChance.label: Scaria rot chance
scariaRotChance.description: Probability in [0, 1] that a downed enemy pawn develops scaria disease, causing rapid corpse rot.

colonistMoodOffset.label: Colonist mood offset
colonistMoodOffset.description: Flat additive modifier applied to all colonist mood values. Negative values reduce baseline mood.

tradePriceFactorLoss.label: Trade price factor loss
tradePriceFactorLoss.description: Penalty applied to the prices the player receives when selling items to traders.

cropYieldFactor.label: Crop yield factor
cropYieldFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the quantity of items produced when harvesting grown crops.

mineYieldFactor.label: Mine yield factor
mineYieldFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the quantity of resources obtained when mining ore or chunks.

butcherYieldFactor.label: Butcher yield factor
butcherYieldFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the quantity of meat and leather obtained when butchering animals or corpses.

fishingYieldFactor.label: Fishing yield factor
fishingYieldFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the quantity of fish caught during fishing activities.

researchSpeedFactor.label: Research speed factor
researchSpeedFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the research points generated per unit of work when researching technologies.

diseaseIntervalFactor.label: Disease interval factor
diseaseIntervalFactor.description: Multiplier on the interval between disease outbreaks. Higher values mean rarer diseases.

enemyReproductionRateFactor.label: Enemy reproduction rate factor
enemyReproductionRateFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the rate at which enemy factions reproduce or reinforce their populations.

playerPawnInfectionChanceFactor.label: Player pawn infection chance factor
playerPawnInfectionChanceFactor.description: Multiplier on the probability that a player-controlled pawn contracts an infection from a wound.

manhunterChanceOnDamageFactor.label: Manhunter chance on damage factor
manhunterChanceOnDamageFactor.description: Multiplier on the probability that an animal enters a manhunter state after being wounded.

deepDrillInfestationChanceFactor.label: Deep drill infestation chance factor
deepDrillInfestationChanceFactor.description: Multiplier on the probability of an insect infestation triggering when using a deep drill.

wastepackInfestationChanceFactor.label: Wastepack infestation chance factor
wastepackInfestationChanceFactor.description: Multiplier on the probability of an insect infestation triggered by accumulated wastepacks.

nomadicMineableResourcesFactor.label: Nomadic mineable resources factor
nomadicMineableResourcesFactor.description: Multiplier on the quantity of mineable resources available on nomadic map tiles.

foodPoisonChanceFactor.label: Food poison chance factor
foodPoisonChanceFactor.description: Multiplier on the probability that eating food with a low-skill cook causes food poisoning.

maintenanceCostFactor.label: Maintenance cost factor
maintenanceCostFactor.description: Multiplier on the silver cost of maintaining structures and equipment over time.

enemyDeathOnDownedChanceFactor.label: Enemy death on downed chance factor
enemyDeathOnDownedChanceFactor.description: Multiplier on the probability that an enemy pawn dies outright when downed rather than being captured.

adaptationGrowthRateFactorOverZero.label: Adaptation growth rate factor over zero
adaptationGrowthRateFactorOverZero.description: Multiplier on how quickly the colony adaptation score grows when it is above zero.

adaptationEffectFactor.label: Adaptation effect factor
adaptationEffectFactor.description: Multiplier on how strongly the colony adaptation score scales up raid threat points.

questRewardValueFactor.label: Quest reward value factor
questRewardValueFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the silver or item value of rewards offered by quests.

raidLootPointsFactor.label: Raid loot points factor
raidLootPointsFactor.description: Multiplier on the loot point budget used to fill enemy raiders' equipment and inventory.

allowTraps.label: Allow traps
allowTraps.description: Whether the player is permitted to build and use trap structures such as IED mines and spike traps.

allowTurrets.label: Allow turrets
allowTurrets.description: Whether the player is permitted to build automated turrets for base defense.

allowMortars.label: Allow mortars
allowMortars.description: Whether the player is permitted to build and operate mortar emplacements.

classicMortars.label: Classic mortars
classicMortars.description: When true, enables simplified classic mortar behavior without the full targeting and crew mechanics.

allowExtremeWeatherIncidents.label: Allow extreme weather incidents
allowExtremeWeatherIncidents.description: Whether extreme weather events such as eclipses, solar flares, and volcanic winters can occur.

fixedWealthMode.label: Fixed wealth mode
fixedWealthMode.description: When true, freezes the colony wealth calculation so raid point budgets do not scale with prosperity.

lowPopConversionBoost.label: Low pop conversion boost
lowPopConversionBoost.description: Multiplier on prisoner conversion chance when the colony population is low.

minThreatPointsRangeCeiling.label: Min threat points range ceiling
minThreatPointsRangeCeiling.description: Caps the minimum raid size so early-game threats still apply some pressure regardless of colony strength.

childAgingRate.label: Child aging rate
childAgingRate.description: Multiplier on biological aging speed for child-aged pawns (Biotech DLC).

adultAgingRate.label: Adult aging rate
adultAgingRate.description: Multiplier on biological aging speed for adult pawns (Biotech DLC).

unwaveringPrisoners.label: Unwavering prisoners
unwaveringPrisoners.description: When true, prisoners never break under sustained persuasion and refuse all recruitment attempts.

childRaidersAllowed.label: Child raiders allowed
childRaidersAllowed.description: Whether enemy raids may include child-aged pawns as combatants.

anomalyThreatsInactiveFraction.label: Anomaly threats inactive fraction
anomalyThreatsInactiveFraction.description: Share of the threat budget allocated to anomaly incidents during the quiet horror phase (Anomaly DLC).

anomalyThreatsActiveFraction.label: Anomaly threats active fraction
anomalyThreatsActiveFraction.description: Share of the threat budget allocated to anomaly incidents during the active horror phase (Anomaly DLC).

studyEfficiencyFactor.label: Study efficiency factor
studyEfficiencyFactor.description: Multiplier on research points gained from studying anomaly entities (Anomaly DLC).
